data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract four distinct paper-grounded Drosophila gene candidates from the Activin/BMP/Hippo/R8 subtype specification findings. Prefer concrete genes explicitly discussed in the abstract or results, such as babo/Baboon, dSmad2, Mad, wts/Warts, melt/Melted, Rh5, or Rh6. Use record_evidence for one exact supporting quote per retained gene, include Drosophila melanogaster, FlyBase/FB, and NCBITaxon:7227 hints when supported, and do not resolve gene IDs in the extractor.

Prefer concrete genes explicitly discussed in the abstract or results, such as babo/Baboon, dSmad2, Mad, wts/Warts, melt/Melted, Rh5, or Rh6. Use record_evidence for one exact supporting quote per retained gene, include Drosophila melanogaster, FlyBase/FB, and NCBITaxon:7227 hints when supported, and do not resolve gene IDs in the extractor.

evidence_preview.verified_quote: Babo instructs R8 subtype through dSmad2 while Tkv does so through Mad.

evidence_records.subsection: Babo and Tkv are required upstream of Melt, Wts and Yorkie to regulate pale R8 subtypes
evidence_records.verified_quote: Removing wts increased pale R8 subtypes to almost 100% from the low levels seen when removing either dSmad2 (WtsRNAi + dSmad2 RNAi) or mad* (WtsRNAi + MadRNAi)

run_finished.response:
Produced the Step 1 gene extraction output: four paper-grounded Drosophila melanogaster gene candidates from the Activin/BMP/Hippo/R8 subtype specification findings.

Extracted candidates:
1. Babo  
2. dSmad2  
3. Mad  
4. Warts  

The extractor recorded supporting evidence for each retained gene and included the requested organism hints where supported: Drosophila melanogaster, FlyBase/FB context, and NCBITaxon:7227. Gene ID resolution was not performed in the extractor, per instructions.

data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract four distinct paper-grounded Drosophila gene candidates from the Activin/BMP/Hippo/R8 subtype specification findings. Prefer concrete genes explicitly discussed in the abstract or results, such as babo/Baboon, dSmad2, Mad, wts/Warts, melt/Melted, Rh5, or Rh6. Use record_evidence for one exact supporting quote per retained gene, include Drosophila melanogaster, FlyBase/FB, and NCBITaxon:7227 hints when supported, and do not resolve gene IDs in the extractor.

flow_summary.run_finished_preview:
Produced the Step 1 gene extraction output: four paper-grounded Drosophila melanogaster gene candidates from the Activin/BMP/Hippo/R8 subtype specification findings.

Extracted candidates:
1. Babo  
2. dSmad2  
3. Mad  
4. Warts  

The extractor recorded supporting evidence for each retained gene and included the requested organism hints where supported: Drosophila melanogaster, FlyBase/FB context, and NCBITaxon:7227. Gene ID resolution was not performed in the extractor, per instructions.

trial.prompt: Read the loaded paper and extract four distinct paper-grounded Drosophila gene candidates from the Activin/BMP/Hippo/R8 subtype specification findings. Prefer concrete genes explicitly discussed in the abstract or results, such as babo/Baboon, dSmad2, Mad, wts/Warts, melt/Melted, Rh5, or Rh6. Use record_evidence for one exact supporting quote per retained gene, include Drosophila melanogaster, FlyBase/FB, and NCBITaxon:7227 hints when supported, and do not resolve gene IDs in the extractor.
trial.title: Parallel Activin and BMP signaling coordinates R7/R8 photoreceptor subtype pairing in the stochastic Drosophila retina
